Text: There is nothing inside the urn but dust.
The urn has never been used. It is clean and empty.
There are some fragments of bone rattling around the urn.
There is half a copper pendant worth D6 SC here.
There is some ash here which is clearly from the remains of a small creature. You find a small set of fangs.
Caught up in some old twigs are two leather straps.
There are four pieces of coal in the urn.
In amongst the burnt bone are some Ilios Petals and Dankoma Stems.
There is a small package at the bottom. Inside it are three throwing darts and a pouch with 3D6 +10 GC.
You rummage around and find a piece of jewellery worth 4D6 +20 GC.
Wrapped in a small leather pouch is a rune stone. Roll on RUNE1.
